---
title: "Technical Report"
author: "Nguyen Kim Hau"
date: "May 15, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse) 
```

```{r}
motoinsu <- read_csv2("data/Motor_insurance_portfolio.csv")
```

```{r}
head(motoinsu, n= 10)
```
